title: Knysna High team wins at Oakhill
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna High School became the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna High School became the winners of the u.16 boys Co-Ed Hockey Festival tournament hosted by Oakhill in the past weekend.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna High School became the winners of the u.16 boys Co-Ed Hockey Festival tournament hosted by Oakhill in the past weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The matches were played at the Oakhill Sports Complex and at Knysna High School's astro. There were seven schools that participated in the event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Highest Goal Scorer and Most Valuable Player of the tournament awards went to Jayden Booysen of Knysna High School. He scored 13 goals in total.","html":"The Highest Goal Scorer and Most Valuable Player of the tournament awards went to Jayden Booysen of Knysna High School. He scored 13 goals in total."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
